about.seoTitle: About OMZONE — Wellness in Puerto Vallarta
about.seoDescription: Premium wellness experiences in Puerto Vallarta and Bahía de Banderas. Our story, philosophy and commitment to transformation.
about.title: About OMZONE
about.intro: We curate transformative wellness experiences — sessions, immersions, retreats and stays — designed to nurture your body, mind and spirit.

contact.seoDescription: Get in touch with OMZONE in Puerto Vallarta. We'd love to hear from you about our wellness experiences.
contact.title: Contact
contact.intro: We'd love to hear from you. Reach out and we'll get back to you as soon as possible.

privacy.seoDescription: Learn how OMZONE collects, uses and protects your personal information.

privacy.body: This privacy policy will be updated with full details about how OMZONE collects, uses and protects your personal information.
